note: seq=122: PROACTIVE 60s TIMER SENTINEL -- primary schedule-death detector. Long-running watched service (Restart=always), EVERY 60s verifies every Tier-1 timer (NRD/SoS/CT) + all atlas-*.timer are ENABLED + have a future NextElapse. The NRD failure mode (a oneshot whose timer is disabled/unscheduled -- NOT a 'failed' unit) is caught within ONE ~60s cycle and re-enabled+started immediately + escalated (sentinel.json + alert). EXCLUDE-list protects intentionally-disabled units (atlas-backup-status). 26h output-SLA (seq-121 freshness monitor) stays as final backstop only. selftest 3/3 gates deploy (step3). LIVE PROOF (step7 kick): installs a throwaway probe timer, ENABLES then DISABLES it (simulating schedule death), runs the sentinel --once which must CATCH+REVIVE it and log revived:[probe] in sentinel.json. Verified 113L,__main__,clean-end.

steps.note: seq=122: proactive 60s timer sentinel + live disable->revive probe proof.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; p='/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_timer_sentinel.py'; h=hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest(); sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+h) if h!='37c52387df68f18c5a03878a6d8e2e7f605c90ce4c6a8433cc055bdbfa364326' else print('sentinel sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS sentinel probe (throwaway; live disable->revive proof target)

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/bin/true

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS sentinel probe timer

[Timer]
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS proactive 60s TIMER SENTINEL (schedule-death detector, NRD failure mode)
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=SENTINEL_INTERVAL=60
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_timer_sentinel.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s,sys; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','--now','atlas-sentinel-probe.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','disable','atlas-sentinel-probe.timer']); s.run(['/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_timer_sentinel.py','--once']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-timer-sentinel.service']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-timer-sentinel.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-timer-sentinel.service']); print('sentinel live + live-proof executed')"
